# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "serverName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the Azure SQL logical server."
      }
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the Azure SQL database."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The location for all resources."
      }
    },
    "administratorLogin": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The administrator login name for the SQL server."
      }
    },
    "administratorLoginPassword": {
      "type": "secureString",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The administrator password for the SQL server."
      }
    },
    "serverVersion": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "12.0",
      "allowedValues": [
        "12.0"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The SQL server version."
      }
    },
    "databaseSkuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Basic",
        "Standard",
        "Premium"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The SKU name for the database."
      }
    },
    "databaseSkuTier": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Basic",
        "Standard",
        "Premium"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The SKU tier for the database."
      }
    },
    "databaseSkuCapacity": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 5,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The SKU capacity for the database."
      }
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2021-11-01",
      "name": "[parameters('serverName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('administratorLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]",
        "version": "[parameters('serverVersion')]"
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "firewallRules",
          "apiVersion": "2021-11-01",
          "name": "AllowAzureServices",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
            "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
          }
        },
        {
          "type": "databases",
          "apiVersion": "2021-11-01",
          "name": "[parameters('databaseName')]",
          "location": "[parameters('location')]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
          ],
          "sku": {
            "name": "[parameters('databaseSkuName')]",
            "tier": "[parameters('databaseSkuTier')]",
            "capacity": "[parameters('databaseSkuCapacity')]"
          },
          "properties": {
            "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
            "maxSizeBytes": 5368709120,
            "sampleName": null
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "sqlServerFqdn": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
    }
  }
}
